CompleteUpload.description: Grants permission to complete an upload of an attachment for a quote or order

CreateOrderV1.description: Grants permission to create an order

CreateQuote.description: Grants permission to create a quote

GetAvsCorrectAddress.description: Grants permission to validate an address

GetBillingAddresses.description: Grants permission to list the billing addresses in the AWS Account

GetDeliveryAddressesV2.description: Grants permission to list the delivery addresses in the AWS Account

GetOrder.description: Grants permission to describe an order

GetOrdersV2.description: Grants permission to list the orders in the AWS Account

GetQuote.description: Grants permission to describe a quote

GetTaxes.description: Grants permission to calculate taxes for an order

ListQuotes.description: Grants permission to list the quotes in the AWS Account

StartUpload.description: Grants permission to start an upload of an attachment for a quote or order

SubmitOrderV1.description: Grants permission to submit an order

UpdateQuote.description: Grants permission to modify a quote
